positive: A majestic celestial fox silhouette, rendered in a neo-tribal linocut style. The fox is centered and facing forward, surrounded by intricate cosmic elements like stylized moons, constellations, and nebula swirls. The artwork should feature high contrast, clean solid black linework against a crisp, off-white background. Use deep indigo and gold leaf accents for fill, maintaining a graphic, vector-like purity. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a powerful, easily readable graphic art suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, detailed negative space.
